data.description: HE ADDED THAT COLLECTING TOLLS IN IRANIAN RIALS FOR PILOTING AND ENSURING THE SAFETY OF VESSELS, OR USING CURRENCIES SUCH AS CHINA’S YUAN AND EVEN CRYPTOCURRENCIES IN ENERGY TRANSACTIONS, WOULD SIGNAL THE “WEAKENING OF US FINANCIAL DOMINANCE” AND THE “BEGINNING OF THE PATH TOWARD DE-DOLLARIZATION.”
JALIL MOKHTAR SAID THE DRAFT LEGISLATION, TITLED THE “STRATEGIC ACTION FOR THE SECURITY OF THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ,” AIMS TO REDEFINE PASSAGE RULES THROUGH THE KEY WATERWAY.

A MEMBER OF THE IRANIAN PARLIAMENT'S ENERGY COMMITTEE SAID ON MONDAY THAT A PROPOSED PARLIAMENTARY BILL ON THE SECURITY OF THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ COULD CHANGE TRANSIT REGULATIONS IN THE PERSIAN GULF.
- IRANINTL

data.title: Sanctions waiver for Russian oil expires, impacting global prices. Moscow selling oil currently at sea.
data.description: A waiver on sanctions has permitted Moscow to sell oil already in transit, with the goal of maintaining global oil prices at a lower level.

data.title: Pest Control Market Worth $44.3 Billion by 2034 | Allied Market Research
data.description: In Portland, Oregon on April 13, 2026, it was reported that the prevalence of vector-borne diseases such as malaria, dengue fever, Lyme disease, and salmonellosis has been on the rise. As a result, there has been a growing need for professional pest management services, leading to an expansion in the pest control market. This surge in demand has contributed to an increase in market growth. The increased incidence of these diseases highlights the importance of effective pest control measures in protecting public health.

data.title: Arevon Announces New Operations Leadership with Promotions of Anand Narayanan and Jeremy Rand
data.description: Arevon Energy, Inc., a prominent energy developer, owner, and operator based in Scottsdale, Arizona, disclosed on April 13, 2026, the elevation of Anand Narayanan and Jeremy Rand to key positions in the company's Executive Team as of April 1, 2026. This move signifies a notable development within the organization's leadership, underscoring the company's strategic approach to talent management and succession planning.

data.title: Batteries Plus Powers into 2026 with Strong Q1 Franchise Growth and National Recognition
data.description: In a promising start to 2026, Batteries Plus, the top battery and power solutions service center in the nation, has announced that they have sold a total of 14 units. This includes welcoming seven new franchise owners across six different states. The company, based in HARTLAND, Wis., revealed these impressive numbers on April 13, 2026. This development marks a strong beginning for their franchise expansion efforts in the first quarter of the year.

data.description: The Biomedical Sensor Market is currently on the rise due to factors such as the growing number of chronic diseases, heightened need for continuous health monitoring, and quick adoption of sensors in wearable and implantable medical tools. data.title: Portable Blenders Market Set to Reach USD 764 Mn by 2035 Driven by Rising Health Awareness, and Innovation in Rechargeable Smart Kitchen Appliances - Market Research Intellect
data.description: Consumers are showing a growing interest in convenience, healthy living, and on-the-go nutrition solutions, leading to a steady expansion of the Portable Blenders Market globally. The market has seen a significant rise in demand, with sales reaching high numbers in regions worldwide.

data.title: Levels® Launches Strawberry Whey Protein at Target Stores in the U.S.
data.description: Today, the company Levels introduced a new 1.48 lb canister of Strawberry Whey Protein Powder, which is made with minimal ingredients and is all-natural. This product is now on sale at various Target stores across the country. The launch was made public from Jupiter, Florida, on April 13, 2026. This new offering provides consumers with a convenient way to access high-quality protein supplement in an easy-to-use container.

data.title: GORBEL® UNVEILS THE DESTUFF-IT™ 2.0 AT MODEX 2026
data.description: New portable ergonomic conveyor system in ROCHESTER, N.Y. and ATLANTA, launched on April 13, 2026, aims to enhance efficiency and reduce strain in warehousing environments. With over 15 years of experience in the industry, this innovative system promises improved performance. The system is designed to address the specific needs of warehouses, boosting productivity while lessening physical strain on workers.

data.title: Facephi to Report Audited 2025 Financial Results on April 29, 2026
data.description: A global leader in digital identity verification and fraud prevention, Facephi, will be reporting its audited financial results for 2025 on April 29, 2026. The company's stock information includes BME Growth: FACE and PARIS: ALPHI. The announcement states that the report will be released after the market closes on April 29, 2026. Facephi will be hosting a webcast on May 5, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. CT to discuss the financial results. The event will be accessible via webcast. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: A New Chapter for Gaithersburg, MD: WRS Inc. Breaks Ground on Transformative $1.2 Billion Lakeforest Mall Redevelopment
data.description: In Gaithersburg, Maryland, on April 13, 2026, city officials, community leaders, and representatives from WRS Inc. came together to commemorate the commencement of the Lakeforest Redevelopment project. This innovative mixed-use initiative is set to rejuvenate the 102-acre Lakeforest site.
